name: Engram Memory
description: Bridges Engram (emotional + conceptual memory) into OpenClaw prompt pipeline. Auto-retrieves on before_prompt_build, auto-writes on turn end.

maxResults.description: Max memory results to inject per turn

maxConcepts.description: Max concept results to inject per turn

writeEnabled.description: Whether to write turn content back to Engram

sessionFilter.description: Only process sessions matching this prefix (e.g. 'agent:main:'). Empty = all sessions.
